## Checklist

### Scope
- [ ] This PR has a clear, focused scope. It does not mix unrelated changes.

### Testing
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the changes.
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`).
- [ ] TypeScript type checking passes (`npm run typecheck`).
- [ ] Lint and format checks pass (`npm run check`).

### Security
- [ ] This PR does NOT include API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials.
- [ ] This PR does NOT include debug logs, error logs, or sensitive output.
- [ ] This PR does NOT introduce new ways to leak sensitive data (reviewed logging paths).
- [ ] If this PR changes tool handling or permissions, the security impact has been considered.

### Compatibility
- [ ] This PR maintains compatibility with Windows, Linux, and macOS.
- [ ] This PR does not break existing configuration paths or settings schemas.
- [ ] Breaking changes (if any) are documented below.

### License / Origin
- [ ] I have the right to contribute this code.
- [ ] No code has been copied from sources with incompatible licenses.
- [ ] Any AI-assisted code has been reviewed and I take full responsibility for it.

### UI (if applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots or terminal recordings are attached for UI changes.
